caption: A man with a tall, light-colored, stylized hairstyle, glasses, and a white long-sleeved shirt with a bow tie sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins, including a shirt with the word "LEE" visible. A logo appearing in the lower left and center of the scene features a microphone icon and the text "TALK RADIO PODCAST" and "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, his expression shifting slightly as he speaks, and his head moves marginally. The background and equipment remain static throughout the scene, maintaining a consistent indoor studio environment while the man delivers his dialogue.
